title: Project: Data Analysis Toolkit
tagline: Build statistical analysis functions using loops.
description: Create functions for mean, median, mode, standard deviation, and filtering — all using loops.
requirements: Calculate mean with a sum loop
solution:
def mean(d): return sum(d)/len(d) if d else None
def median(d):
    if not d: return None
    s = sorted(d); m = len(s)//2
    return s[m] if len(s)%2 else (s[m-1]+s[m])/2
def mode(d):
    if not d: return None
    f = {}; [f.update({x: f.get(x,0)+1}) for x in d]
    mc = max(f.values())
    return [k for k,v in f.items() if v==mc]
expectedOutput: Your application produces the expected output.
solutionExplanation: This project demonstrates practical application of the concept.
